bgp_route_translation_for_nat_enabled.description: Indicates if BGP route translation is enabled for NAT.

default_local_network_gateway_id.description: Specifies the ID of the local network gateway to be used as the default.

dns_forwarding_enabled.description: Determines if DNS forwarding is enabled on the virtual network gateway.

edge_zone.description: Specifies the edge zone in which the virtual network gateway should be created.

ip_sec_replay_protection_enabled.description: Indicates if IPsec replay protection is enabled.

name.description: The name of the virtual network gateway.

private_ip_address_enabled.description: Determines if a private IP address is enabled for the gateway.

remote_vnet_traffic_enabled.description: Indicates if traffic to remote virtual networks is enabled.

sku.description: Specifies the SKU of the virtual network gateway.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the resource.

type.description: The type of the virtual network gateway (e.g., VPN or ExpressRoute).

virtual_wan_traffic_enabled.description: Indicates if traffic to a virtual WAN is enabled.

vpn_type.description: Specifies the type of VPN (e.g., PolicyBased or RouteBased).

ip_configuration.description: The IP configuration for the virtual network gateway.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
